title: [codereview-P2] spec/02-physical-link.md DAD note should specify exact hash_32 primitive (SipHash-2-4 with key=0x4c494348454e per 02a-coordinated-capacity.md?)
description: The note mentions hash_32 but spec should pin the exact construction for interop (see CCP-15.8.3 and coordinated capacity file using siphash_2_4 with specific key). Link as discovered-from b6zw. Also check if 04-network.md short addr description needs hash primitive.
